speaker: seller

args.message: Hey, great timing! You've got a solid eye — this 2017 Altima SV is one of our best values right now. Runs smooth, fuel-efficient, and we just detailed it. With that Bluetooth and dual-zone climate, you've got all the modern conveniences. I've actually had two other folks interested this week, so if you want to take it for a spin, I'd do it soon.

args.message: Can you tell me about the maintenance history and if there have been any accidents with this Altima?

text: Can you tell me about the maintenance history and if there have been any accidents with this Altima?

speaker: seller

args.message: Great questions! This Altima has a clean accident history — nothing on the title, I can guarantee you that. As for maintenance, we've got full service records showing regular oil changes, fluid checks, the works. Previous owner was meticulous about keeping up with it. At 104k miles, it's right in that sweet spot where you get good value but still plenty of life left in the drivetrain. We actually had it fully inspected before it hit the lot, so you know you're getting a solid vehicle here.

speaker: buyer

args.message: Given the mileage and competitive market, I would like to offer $11,000 for the Altima.

text: Given the mileage and competitive market, I would like to offer $11,000 for the Altima.

speaker: seller

args.message: I appreciate the offer, and I know mileage is a factor, but look — this one's priced already at $11,495 and it's moving fast. I saw the exact same model go for $11,200 at auction just last week, and that one had higher mileage. How about we meet at $11,250? That's a fair split and honestly, it's a steal at that price point for the condition and features you're getting here.
